description: Distinct pad options from merged well index for the selected fleet.
sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(pad_name, ''), 'Unknown') AS label, COALESCE(NULLIF(pad_name, ''), 'Unknown') AS value, COALESCE(NULLIF(fleet_name, ''), 'Unknown') AS fleet_name FROM featurestore:merged_well_index_v1 WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(fleet_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :fleet_name ORDER BY label) q
